title: ampelocissus sinuosa
intro: Ampelocissus sinuosa, also known as the Indian grapevine or cat's claw vine, is a type of climbing plant native to tropical Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ampelocissus sinuosa include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting digestive health. Ampelocissus sinuosa can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, as well as being used in traditional medicine to make tonics and other remedies.
